title: Jedi Pack

The '''''Jedi Pack''''' was a bonus "gift" given away by [[Decipher]] starting in [[October]] [[1996]] as part of their [[Star Wars Customizable Card Game]]. It was usually accompanied by the [[Rebel Leader Pack]]. It was handed out at tournaments by Decipher advocates to help newer players. For a while it was available for free still on Decipher's website by sending in a SASE and 2$ for shipping and handling. Since the game stopped being printed, Decipher stopped giving them away (as was a term of agreement).

The Jedi Pack contained cards of four main characters from [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'']], with lower statistics than their [[Premiere Limited]] counterparts and no game text. It also included several other cards and the Hyperspace Navigation Chart game aid.

{{Card-stub}}
